title: Italy Trip Planner PWA
description: Day-by-day itinerary app for Aug 12–26. Packing list, restaurant reservations, transfer times, activity slots. Offline-capable so it works without data in Italy.

title: Delta Award Alert Bot
description: Monitors AwardFares for low-mile availability on your watchlist routes (MSP→CUN, MSP→SJD, MSP→MBJ). Sends Telegram alert the moment a deal drops — especially around school breaks.

title: Arsenal Season Tracker — Deep Stats
description: Extends the Intelligence Dashboard with xG charts, progressive passes, pressure maps, and player heatmaps via FBref/Understat scraping. Season-long trend lines.

title: 3am Brain Dump — Insomnia Capture App
description: Minimal, instant-open PWA for your 3-5am racing mind. One tap to start voice or typed capture. Auto-tags entries (work idea / personal / urgent / random). Syncs to daily notes. Built for one-handed use in the dark — no friction, no menus. Good ideas shouldn't die at 3am.

title: Elle's Reading Stars — Gamified Tracker
description: Visual reading progress tracker for Elle. Shows Heart Words mastered as a constellation, earns a Lego brick for each session (she hyperfocuses on Legos — use this). Reads-aloud confirmation, parent-side logging. ADHD-inattentive optimized: big rewards, short sessions, no failure states.

title: Tax Research MCP Server
description: FastMCP server exposing IRC section lookup, OECD guideline search, PLR/case law retrieval, and GILTI/Subpart F quick calcs. Plugs directly into your Claude Code workflows.

title: Abacus AI Training Hub
description: Interactive training PWA for getting up to speed on Abacus AI — both ChatLLM (multi-model interface) and DeepAgent (autonomous agent). Module-based: what it is, model selection guide, RAG chatbots, DeepAgent workflows, data privacy rules, and Cargill-specific tax use cases. Includes quizzes, practical exercises, and step-by-step guides. Built for onboarding your tax org team.

title: Second Brain — AI Knowledge OS
description: A personal knowledge management system that ingests everything you consume — articles you read, YouTube videos you watch, podcasts you listen to, books you finish — and builds a searchable, connected knowledge graph. Ask it "what do I know about transfer pricing?" or "what have I learned about sleep?" and get a synthesis of YOUR accumulated knowledge, not the internet's. Includes spaced repetition for things worth retaining, auto-tagging, and weekly insight digests. Built on top of your existing memory files.

title: Adaptive Training Coach — Injury-Aware AI
description: A full AI coaching system that generates your weekly training program in real-time, adapting to your exact injury profile (C5-C6/C6-C7 discs, bilateral AC joints, right knee, right ankle). Not generic — it knows your PRs, your history, your bad days. Each morning it asks: how's the neck? How'd you sleep? Then generates today's session with substitutions pre-loaded. Tracks progressive overload week over week, flags when you're pushing too hard, integrates PT exercises into the program rather than treating them as separate. Apple Health sync for HRV and sleep data.
